pillars.title: Pro-life witness
pillars.desc: hope, healing, and stories from years of front-line advocacy.

pillars.title: Soothing the sorrowing heart
pillars.desc: consolation for those whose loved ones have left the faith — in the spirit of St. Monica and Our Lady of Sorrows.

pillars.title: Surrender & spiritual enrichment
pillars.desc: surrender as a way of life; she has co-led retreats on this theme.

pillars.title: The writing life
pillars.desc: author presentations for schools and workshops for writers of every age.

pillars.title: Marriage & family
pillars.desc: a special interest close to home — the beauty of lifelong love and the family it anchors.
